subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter, together with a photograph, hath reached me. In truth, thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما با سواد عکس انداخته دو مکتوب رسید فی الحقیقه آنجناب
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @call to action, @non-participation in politics
